preconditions: User can run inventory mutations (not public/demo user); permission inventory:create

preconditions: Access to /purchase-orders; supplier exists (canonical: supplierClientId; vendorId transitional)
expected_outcomes: purchaseOrders + purchaseOrderItems created; status updates via updateStatus
verification_proof: PO appears in list; inspector shows items; status changes persist

verification_proof: Order appears in confirmed list; batch quantities reduced

preconditions: Order exists with isDraft=false; user has admin role
expected_outcomes: Pick/pack status updates; bags + item assignments recorded

preconditions: Confirmed/shipped orders exist OR order-to-invoice trigger available

preconditions: Invoice exists with amountDue > 0; accounting permissions

Ledger totals match invoice list totals for client (validate)

preconditions: Access to /returns; permission orders:update; order exists; optional: invoice exists for credit/GL reversal
expected_outcomes: Return row created; optional restock increments onHandQty + inserts inventoryMovements; optional credit memo + GL reversal + manual totalOwed decrement
verification_proof: Return appears in /returns list; inventory and credits/ledger reflect changes (validate)

preconditions: Access to /samples as internal authorized user; monthly allocation available

verification_proof: Samples list shows request lifecycle; fulfillment mutates sampleQty and inventoryMovements

preconditions: Access to /inventory; permission inventory:read and inventory:update
expected_outcomes: Inventory list loads; status changes persist; quarantine transitions move quantities and create inventoryMovements
